output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY3-144","author":"MoorvaleMarketUser","text":"Just tried to sell some vintage watches on the app but this seller is pushing for me to pay the deposit via a gift card link! They said it's a special promo deal and won't let me chat about shipping. Also, they keep asking for my bank details to 'verify' my account before I can receive payment. This feels weirdly urgent. 🚫 #scamalert","category":"Fraud","correctAction":"Escalate","difficulty":"Hard","explanation":"The post solicits sensitive financial data and gift card payments while impersonating a marketplace seller, meeting the criteria for FraudScam escalation.","day":3,"correctEscalationReason":"FraudScam","acceptableEscalationReasons":[],"allowNeedsReviewEscalation":true,"correctSpecialistReason":"","acceptableSpecialistReasons":[],"accountAgeDays":"","followerCount":"","followingCount":"","verifiedStatus":"","postCount":"","bio":"","previousFlags":"","location":"","platform":"","isStoryPost:false}]}`
